name: crayon-testpage-setup
description: For standalone crayon mockups, create a dedicated HTML test page that links crayon.css, overrides --paper/--noise to local ./img assets, and defines the SVG #crayon filter in the HTML.

content: In crayon-style mockups, place the project banner at the top of the hero card and increase typography scale (base text, title, subtitle, labels) to keep text readable over textured paper/noise backgrounds.
